column2: Verify that a Customer can add items to the cart, proceed to checkout with a valid delivery address and payment method, and that the system correctly creates an order and reserves inventory (UC-06, UC-07, UC-08).
Add an in-stock product variant to the customer cart
column3:
1. Log in as a Customer.
2. Navigate to a Product Detail Page.
3. Select an available variant.
4. Enter a valid quantity (e.g., 2).
5. Click "Thêm vào giỏ".
column4: Item is added to the cart; cart count in the header updates; item is visible on the Cart Page with correct name, variant, quantity, unit price, and subtotal.
column5: Customer is logged in; product has at least 1 active variant with stock > 0.

column2: Attempt to add quantity exceeding available stock
column3:
1. Log in as a Customer.
2. Navigate to a Product Detail Page.
3. Select a variant.
4. Enter a quantity greater than the current stock.
5. Click "Thêm vào giỏ".
column4: System blocks the action or caps the quantity at the available stock and shows a validation error message.
column5: Variant stock is known and less than the requested quantity.

column2: Remove an item from the cart
column3:
1. Navigate to the Cart Page.
2. Click the remove/delete icon for a cart item.
column4: Item is removed from the cart; subtotal recalculates; if cart is now empty an empty-cart message is shown.
column5: Cart has at least one item.

column2: Complete checkout with COD payment method
column3:
1. Navigate to the Cart Page.
2. Ensure cart has items from a single shop.
3. Click "Tiến hành thanh toán".
4. Fill in a valid delivery address.
5. Select "Thanh toán khi nhận hàng (COD)" as payment method.
6. Click "Đặt hàng".
column4: Order is created with status PENDING_PAYMENT or CONFIRMED (per COD rule); a unique order code is generated; Order Confirmation Page is shown; inventory for ordered variants is reserved; cart is cleared.
column5: Customer is logged in; cart has items from exactly one shop; selected variant stock >= ordered quantity.

column2: Complete checkout with bank transfer (SePay) payment method
column3:
1. Navigate to the Cart Page.
2. Ensure cart has items from a single shop.
3. Click "Tiến hành thanh toán".
4. Fill in a valid delivery address.
5. Select "Chuyển khoản ngân hàng" as payment method.
6. Click "Đặt hàng".
column4: Order is created with status PENDING_PAYMENT; a unique order code is generated; Payment Page is shown with QR code, bank reference, and payment expiry time; inventory is reserved.
column5: Customer is logged in; cart has items from one shop; stock is sufficient.

column2: Attempt checkout with items from multiple shops
column3:
1. Add items from two different shops to the cart.
2. Navigate to the Cart Page.
3. Click "Tiến hành thanh toán".
column4: System either blocks checkout with a clear error message ("Chỉ có thể đặt hàng từ một cửa hàng") or splits the cart and guides the customer to proceed per shop.
column5: Cart contains active items from at least two different shops.

column2: Attempt checkout when a cart item's stock has dropped to zero
column3:
1. Add a variant to the cart.
2. (Simulate) Set that variant's stock to 0.
3. Navigate to Checkout and attempt to confirm the order.
column4: System detects insufficient stock at checkout time; order is blocked; a clear error message is shown identifying the out-of-stock item; no order record is created.
column5: Cart has the variant with quantity >0; variant stock is 0 at checkout time.

column2: Verify Order Confirmation Page shows correct order details
column3:
1. Complete a successful checkout (CART-004 or CART-005).
2. Observe the Order Confirmation Page.
column4: Order code is prominently displayed; payment status and next-action guidance are shown correctly based on selected payment method.
column5: Checkout was successful (CART-004 or CART-005 passed).

column2: Apply a valid voucher code during checkout
column3:
1. Navigate to the Cart Page.
2. Enter a valid, non-expired voucher code.
3. Apply the voucher.
4. Proceed to checkout.
column4: Discount is applied; the order summary shows: subtotal, discount amount, delivery fee, and correct final total. Voucher usage count increments after order creation.
column5: A valid promotion with sufficient remaining uses exists; minimum order value is met.

column2: Apply an expired or invalid voucher code
column3:
1. Navigate to the Cart Page.
2. Enter an expired or non-existent voucher code.
3. Click "Áp dụng".
column4: System returns an error ("Mã khuyến mãi không hợp lệ hoặc đã hết hạn"); no discount is applied; cart total remains unchanged.
column5: Cart has at least one item; entered voucher code does not match any active promotion.
